name: recommended sets: extends:[<plugin-id>:recommended] activates only rules from that plugin where recommended:true
command:
mkdir -p tree/_community/acme && echo "maintainer: a
license: MIT" > tree/_community/acme/README.md && printf "source:
  id: a
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: acme/rec-rule, name: r, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: community-plugin, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
recommended_set: [acme/rec-rule]
all_set: [acme/rec-rule]
" > tree/_community/acme/x.yaml && printf "extends: [acme:recommended]
" > profile.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" profile.yaml --tree "$PWD/tree" --emit-resolved 2>out.json && grep "acme/rec-rule" out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
